new_classes.label_en: Other spirituous beverages (other), in containers holding > 2 l (CN 2208 90 77)
new_classes.label_de: Andere Spirituosen (andere), in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 l (KN 2208 90 77)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverages of CN heading 2208 that are not classifiable as arrack, plum/pear/cherry spirit, other fruit spirit, whisky, rum, gin, vodka, liqueur, or the specific 'other spirituous beverages' of subheading 2208 90 56 (≤ 2 l) / 2208 90 69 (> 2 l), and that are presented in containers holding more than 2 litres. This subheading corresponds to the 'other' category complementary to 2208 90 56 but for large containers, as explained by the explanatory note referencing subheading 2208 90 56.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for CN 2208 90 77 is minimal — "Other" — with an explicit cross-reference to the explanatory note for subheading 2208 90 56. That sibling subheading (already modelled as OtherSpiritSmallContainer22089056) covers the same 'other spirituous beverages (other)' category but in containers ≤ 2 l, whereas 2208 90 77 covers containers > 2 l. The three key criteria captured are: (1) membership in SpiritsLiqueursOtherSpiritousBeverages2208, (2) presence of a LargeContainer (> 2 l), and (3) the OtherSpiritousQuality discriminating it from named spirit categories (arrack, fruit, whisky, rum, gin, vodka, liqueur). A complement restriction against OtherSpiritousBeverageMixtureQuality aligns with the sibling 2208 90 56 model. Coverage is not 1.0 because the full enumeration of excluded spirit types from subheading 2208 90 56's note cannot be exhaustively expressed as complement axioms without introducing all corresponding quality classes as disjoint restrictions, and the cross-referenced explanatory note content is not directly available in the supplied legal text.
